brief.targetAudience: people who want switch from coffee

copyOptions.angle_rationale: Coffee switchers have a specific pain point (jitters, crash, dependency) and need a credible alternative — Problem-Solution directly addresses the objection and makes the purchase decision feel obvious.
copyOptions.visual_description: A clean, minimal flat-lay shot on a warm natural linen surface with the Organica Tulsi Green Tea box/pouch as the hero product, placed center-frame with a small ceramic cup of pale green tea steaming beside it. Soft warm morning window light from the upper left creates gentle shadows and a calm, grounded mood — no clutter, no coffee mug, just quiet intentional energy.
subheadlines: Tulsi Green Tea gives you clean energy, zero jitters, and no afternoon crash.
Switch from coffee to Organica Tulsi Green Tea — your body will thank you by noon.
Ancient tulsi + green tea = the energy boost coffee never could deliver cleanly.
